name: cyrus-companion
description: Unix socket bridge for Cyrus voice assistant — submits text to Claude Code chat

cyrusCompanion.focusCommand.description: VS Code command ID to focus Claude Code's chat panel. Leave blank for auto-detection. To find the right command: open Command Palette (Ctrl+Shift+P) and search for 'Claude' to see available commands.

cyrusCompanion.brainHost.description: Hostname/IP of Cyrus Brain (for registration and receiving responses)

cyrusCompanion.brainPort.description: Port Cyrus Brain listens on for extension registration (8770)
